ACTIVATE_INTERIOR_LIGHTING_CF.comment: Set when the interior lighting shall be configured.

ANTI_HIJACK_CF.comment: Set when the anti hijack (or single door unlocking) shall be configured.

AT_CF.comment: Set when the automatic gear box shall be configured.

AUTO_RELOCK_TIMEOUT_CF.comment: Set  0 when the auto relock shall be configured. (typical value is 2 min)

AUTO_WINDOW_CLOSING_CF.comment: Set when the auto windows closing shall be configured.

BRAKE_ECU_PRESENT_CF.comment: Set when brake ecu is configured.
